programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Squidward is so tired that SpongeBob and Patrick are unable to wake him up, but they do not want him to miss his big audition; Mr. Krabs and his crew cater a fancy party, but they might be out of their depth with their new wealthy customers.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.sub-title: Cuddle E. Hugs; Pat the Horse
programme.desc: SpongeBob's new friend is a giant, fluffy hamster that no one else can see; Patrick wants to be a horse.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: SpongeBob must go to extreme lengths when Gary refuses to go to the vet; SpongeBob gets stuck while working out.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.sub-title: One Coarse Meal; Gary in Love

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: After the Science Scouts begin selling biscuits to fund a trip to Mars, Mr. Krabs enters the ring and turns it into a competition; a new driving school opens in town.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.sub-title: Mind the Gap; Dirty Bubble Returns
programme.desc: Squidward closes the gap in SpongeBob's teeth, which causes a dramatic and unexpected change in his demeanor; the newly reformed Clean Bubble takes a dishwashing job at the Krusty Krab, where he is tempted by the grime.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Frustrated that he's seen as cute instead of evil, Plankton builds a robot to punish anyone who says "aww!"; Patrick crushes the mailman, so he and SpongeBob deliver the mail around Bikini Bottom.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick create their own zoo that is made entirely of bubbles; the Krusty Krab goes under emergency quarantine, but no one knows who is carrying the mysterious illness.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: SpongeBob visits his old pal Bubble Buddy's hometown, Bubbletown; Sandy invites Karen and Mrs. Puff out for a night on the town, so the ladies decide to blow off some steam.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: SpongeBob obtains a magician's wand and accidentally causes magical mayhem wherever he goes; on Friday the 13th, Mr. Krabs' extreme superstitions become a disruption for everyone around him.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: SpongeBob builds a pool in his backyard, and Squidward tries to resist taking a dip; Mr. Krabs must reckon with the Goobfather after he adds patty whips to the menu.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Patrick discovers that the rock he lives under is actually a sea turtle that overslept; old Man Jenkins disrupts business as usual at the Krusty Krab, but Mr. Krabs can't find a way to kick him out.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Despicable Me 3
programme.desc: The mischievous Minions hope that Gru will return to a life of crime after the new boss of the Anti-Villain League fires him. Instead, Gru decides to remain retired and travel to Freedonia to meet his long-lost twin brother for the first time. The reunited siblings soon find themselves in an uneasy alliance to take down the elusive Balthazar Bratt, a former 1980s child star who seeks revenge against the world.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Joey is overjoyed to be nominated for a "Soapie" award; engaged Monica frets when she realizes she will never experience the thrill of a new relationship again; Ross spots Chandler sneaking out of a male strip club.

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One With Ross and Monica's Cousin
programme.desc: Joey auditions for a big role which will require him to appear naked; Rachel and Phoebe plan Monica's bridal shower; Ross and Monica's attractive cousin visits and stirs the passions of all men who meet her.
